commands.review_summary:
The PR removes MiniMax music duration support from provider capabilities and docs, stops prompt-injecting duration hints, updates the MiniMax provider test, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main advertises MiniMax duration support while the request body has no structured duration field and only appends a natural-language hint. I did not rerun a live pre-fix MiniMax request, but the code path and vendor contract are clear.
commands.review_followup: No repair job is needed; this PR is already the focused fix and should proceed through exact-head CI/automerge plus maintainer compatibility acceptance.
